## Summary / 变更摘要

Describe what changed and why.
说明本次改动内容以及改动原因。

## Type of Change / 改动类型

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Site adapter update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation / 验证

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Manual verification completed when needed

## Notes / 备注

Anything reviewers should pay attention to.
如有需要 review 特别关注的部分，请在这里说明。
